◎简　　介  

　　Premam is all about romance(传奇) and fun, though there is more to it. The life of a person going through various phases(相) is the premise(前提) of the story. Infatuation(迷恋), romance, first love, pain of separation all those emotions(情感) that we all come across in our lives are discussed in an interesting way.Premam is a movie filled with romance, comedy and action.
